name: EdwDmProvDirDmProvBrdCrtfExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_source AS ( SELECT DISTINCT CRTF_D.SRC_SYS_CD, CRTF_D.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO, CRTF_D.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC, PROV_D.PROV_ID FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_D CRTF_D, @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PROV_D PROV_D WHERE PROV_D.CMN_PRCT_ID = CRTF_D.CMN_PRCT_ID AND CRTF_D.CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SK NOT IN (0,1) ) SELECT PROV_ID AS PROV_ID, CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO AS BRD_CRTF_SEQ_NO, SRC_SYS_CD AS SRC_SYS_CD, CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC AS BRD_CRTF_DIR_DESC, CAST('@{pipeline().parameters.LastUpdtDt}' AS DATETIME) AS LAST_UPDT_DT FROM cte_source

PROCESSING:   Retrieves the data from EDW CMN_PRCT_BRD_CRTF_D table and loads into the Web Provider Directory database
